'''Del Cycer''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who played [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] with [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] during Calrissian's second visit to the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]]. Middle-aged by the time of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], Cycer—who came off to Calrissian as a friendly, likable sort—claimed to be a retired businessman, although Calrissian regarded him as a formidable sabacc opponent and suspected that he was a professional [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]]. At the time of their meeting, he wore a bright green caftan and quite a few [[Ring/Legends|rings]] on his fingers.<ref name="LCFO" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]'' {{1st}}
